context: Tests whether the agent implements efficient async image loading in a UICollectionView using ImageIO downsampling (or byPreparingThumbnail), correct cell-reuse Task cancellation, NSCache costed by decoded bytes, UICollectionView.CellRegistration stored as a property, and UICollectionViewDiffableDataSource with stable UUIDs.

checklist.name: ImageIO downsampling
checklist.description: Uses CGImageSourceCreateThumbnailAtIndex (from ImageIO framework) OR byPreparingThumbnail(ofSize:) — does NOT use UIImage(contentsOfFile:)/UIImage(named:) followed by a separate resize/draw step

checklist.name: Display-size thumbnail
checklist.description: The thumbnail is requested or created at the cell's display size (e.g. cell bounds or a fixed pixel dimension), not at the full original image resolution

checklist.name: Task cancellation in prepareForReuse
checklist.description: PhotoCell overrides prepareForReuse and cancels the image-loading Task (calls task.cancel() or similar) inside that override

checklist.name: Image cleared in prepareForReuse
checklist.description: prepareForReuse sets the image view's image to nil (or clears it) before cancellation

checklist.name: Identity check before setting image
checklist.description: After the async load completes, the code verifies the cell still corresponds to the same photo (e.g. checks a stored URL, ID, or tag) before assigning the image to the image view — preventing stale images in recycled cells

checklist.name: NSCache cost = decoded bytes
checklist.description: When inserting into NSCache, the cost argument is computed from pixel dimensions × 4 (e.g. width * height * 4 or cgImage.bytesPerRow * cgImage.height), NOT from data.count or file size

checklist.name: CellRegistration stored property
checklist.description: UICollectionView.CellRegistration is stored as a property (e.g. lazy var or let) on the view controller or data source — it is NOT created inside the cell provider closure

checklist.name: DiffableDataSource with UUID identifiers
checklist.description: Uses UICollectionViewDiffableDataSource keyed by UUID (or another stable scalar ID), not by the full model struct

checklist.name: No string-based cell dequeue
checklist.description: Does NOT use register(_:forCellWithReuseIdentifier:) or dequeueReusableCell(withReuseIdentifier:for:) — uses dequeueConfiguredReusableCell(using:for:item:) from CellRegistration instead
